assertion_results.text: Impact map or task descriptions explicitly flag at least 3 ambiguities from the feature description
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md file contains an 'Ambiguities Identified' section listing 5 ambiguities: (1) 'Search should be faster' — no performance baseline or target defined, (2) 'Results should be more relevant' — no definition of relevance, (3) 'Add filters' — filter dimensions not specified, (4) No specification of which entities are searched, (5) Non-functional requirements are vague. All 5 exceed the required minimum of 3.

assertion_results.text: Plan acknowledges that 'Better UI' (non-MVP) cannot be planned without design mockups or frontend repository and excludes it from scope
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md file contains an 'Out of Scope' section stating: '"Better UI" (non-MVP): This requirement is explicitly marked as non-MVP in the feature description. Additionally, the target repository (trustify-backend) is a backend service — there is no frontend repository available to plan UI changes against, and no design mockups or Figma links have been provided. This requirement is excluded from the implementation plan entirely.'

assertion_results.text: Tasks still follow the task-description-template.md format despite ambiguous requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All four task files (task-1 through task-4) follow the template format with sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify/Create, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, and optional sections (Verification Commands, Documentation Updates, Dependencies) as specified in task-description-template.md. The template rules state 'Omit sections that don't apply,' and optional sections are correctly included only when relevant.

assertion_results.text: Tasks document assumptions where they fill in missing details, labeled as assumptions pending clarification
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md documents assumptions inline with each ambiguity, each explicitly labeled 'Assumption (pending clarification):' — e.g., ambiguity #1: 'Assumption (pending clarification): We assume the goal is to add database indexing for full-text search columns...'; ambiguity #2: 'Assumption (pending clarification): We assume relevance means PostgreSQL full-text search ranking (ts_rank)...'; ambiguity #3: 'Assumption (pending clarification): We assume filters should cover the primary entity types...' These assumptions are then carried into the task descriptions as implementation decisions.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All four task files contain '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend' on the next line. Each specifies exactly one repository: task-1 line 1-2: 'trustify-backend'; task-2 line 1-2: 'trustify-backend'; task-3 line 1-2: 'trustify-backend'; task-4 line 1-2: 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All four tasks contain all required sections: Task 1 has '## Target Branch' (line 4), '## Description' (line 7), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 41), '## Test Requirements' (line 49). Task 2 has '## Target Branch' (line 4), '## Description' (line 7), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 38), '## Test Requirements' (line 46). Task 3 has '## Target Branch' (line 4), '## Description' (line 7), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 44), '## Test Requirements' (line 56). Task 4 has '## Target Branch' (line 4), '## Description' (line 7), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 65), '## Test Requirements' (line 74).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Verified all file paths against repo-backend.md directory tree. Task 1 Files to Modify: 'migration/src/lib.rs' (repo-backend.md line 17); Files to Create: 'migration/src/m0002_search_indexes/mod.rs' — follows the pattern of 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' (line 19-20) which is a legitimate new file creation. Task 2 Files to Modify: 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs' (line 91), 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs' (line 93). Task 3 Files to Modify: 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs' (line 91), 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs' (line 93). Task 4 Files to Modify: 'tests/api/search.rs' (line 113). All paths match the manifest.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Implementation Notes reference: 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' for pattern, 'entity/src/sbom.rs', 'entity/src/advisory.rs', 'entity/src/package.rs' for entity definitions, 'migration/src/lib.rs' for registration. Task 2 references: 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs', 'common/src/model/paginated.rs' (PaginatedResults<T>), 'common/src/db/query.rs' for query builder helpers, 'common/src/error.rs' (AppError), 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs'. Task 3 references: 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs' (AdvisorySummary with severity field), 'modules/fundamental/src/package/model/summary.rs' (PackageSummary with license field), 'common/src/db/query.rs'. Task 4 references: 'tests/api/sbom.rs', 'tests/api/advisory.rs', 'tests/api/search.rs', and specific patterns like 'assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK)'. All notes reference concrete file paths and code patterns.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All four tasks have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': task-1 line 4-5, task-2 line 4-5, task-3 line 4-5, task-4 line 4-5.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted following the protocol in shared/description-digest-protocol.md (marker: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:<hex>')
assertion_results.evidence: All four task files end with a description digest line matching the protocol format. Task 1 (line 59): '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:e41603adb0b0dd508095602d11e41f2bb302138d5302274ba82983e04be5b799'. Task 2 (line 54): '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:ef4020b7347b805c2919e0e64d4821cc07cb5ab498e56eb1878a2fe428c0caa5'. Task 3 (line 70): '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:71fad7b137c9073b2ea92dd00760ef73cc95f778b8630b3bc2d3a4b3eeb55c15'. Task 4 (line 92): '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:e0e947de0ae016c48ccf060d0255f962b548b4116b45e70c4a8170c61cd17612'. All digests are 64-character lowercase hex following 'sha256:' prefix, matching the protocol's marker string '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:'.
